title: The Rundown: Ad tech’s performance in 2025 was overshadowed by AI concerns and Big Tech
description: Despite revenue increases, the markets were brutal but reports over talks with OpenAI proved later upside.

title: As brands respond to AI search, walls crumble between paid and organic
description: Agencies are knitting SEO and PPC teams closer together as they adapt to the new rules of search that are driven by the use of generative AI.

title: ‘Nobody’s asking the question’: WPP’s biggest restructure in years means nothing until CMOs say it does
description: WPP declared itself transformed. CMOs will decide if that’s true.

title: Why a Gen Alpha–focused skin-care brand is giving equity to teen creators
description: Brands are looking for new ways to build relationships that last, and go deeper than a hashtag-sponsored post.

title: The Future of Marketing Briefing: Epsilon’s quiet bet against the LLM goldrush
description: In advertising’s AI race, Epsilon says the winners won’t pick one mode. They’ll orchestrate many.

title: Cursor's Third Era: Cloud Agents
description: The $50B Agent Lab has acquired Graphite and Autotab and now announcing that Cloud Agents has overtaken its historical "VSCode fork" IDE usecase, ushering in the "Third Era of Software Development"

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Friday, March 6
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 6.

title: Today's NYT Connections: Sports Edition Hints and Answers for March 6, #529
description: Here are hints and the answers for the NYT Connections: Sports Edition puzzle for March 6, No. 529.

title: McDonald's CEO Burger Video: Ketchup With This Bizarre New Meme
description: The executive tentatively took a bite of his company's new "product," and now even McDonald's own social media is relishing the mockery.

title: Google's Canvas AI Project-Planning Tool Is Now Available to Everyone in the US
description: The AI workspace offers a dedicated space to organize plans and projects.

title: Daylight Saving Time Is Almost Here. Here's How to Get Ready
description: Get ready to spring forward and lose an hour of sleep but gain more daylight.

title: Seller Central AI Remakes Data Analysis
description:
The new "dynamic canvas experience" hints at a broader shift from reporting to conversational business intelligence.
The post Seller Central AI Remakes Data Analysis appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: The Salvation Army launches first digital thrift store on Roblox
description: “Thrift Score” is a shoppable digital environment — and a way to engage Gen Z and Gen Alpha consumers.

title: Adidas extends CEO’s contract amid record revenues
description: Bjørn Gulden has made “tremendous operational and financial progress," according to the board. The retailer’s 2025 revenue reached 24.8 billion euros.

title: Victoria’s Secret & Co. ends Adore Me subscription offering
description: The intimates company also initiated a strategic review of the personal styling service DailyLook, which it acquired through the Adore Me transaction.
